sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n10054" key="a)nti/krios" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀντίκριος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n10054.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">counter-ram,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0058.tlg001.perseus-grc1:22:7" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aen.Tact.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">22.7</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
